REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER NOE, VERONICA SMITH NOTICE OF PETITION TO EXPUNGE MECHANICS LIEN IS GRANTED. REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES IS DENIED. COUNSEL'S DECLARATION FAILS TO PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE OF REASONABLENESS OF FEES (HOURS, RATE, EXPERIENCE, ETC.). PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO SUBMIT A SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IS DENIED AS NOT TIMELY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition To Expunge Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ron Lunski, (415) 426-3525 of Lunski & Stimpert LLP for Petitioner/Opposing party.
Ethan Turner, (415)883-8059 Defendant/Moving party.

Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER CHRISTOPHER NOE, VERONICA SMITH Notice Of Petition To Expunge Mechanics Lien is GRANTED. Request for attorney's fees is denied. Counsel's declaration fails to provide any evidence of reasonableness of fees (hours, rate, experience, etc.). Plaintiff's request to submit a supplemental declaration is denied as not timely. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
